technology.title: As AI pushes data centres to breaking point, some Chinese chipmakers bet on SiC
technology.summary: As the global artificial intelligence (AI) boom puts intense pressure on data centre energy grids, some Chinese chipmakers are betting on highly efficient silicon carbide (SiC) semiconductors to help solve the technology sector’s power problem. Shenzhen-based Basic Semiconductor is the latest contender looking to bankroll its expansion after it passed a listing hearing earlier this week in its path to an initial public offering (IPO) in Hong Kong. Founded in 2016 by graduates from Tsinghua...

briefing.news_focus: As the global artificial intelligence (AI) boom puts intense pressure on data centre energy grids, some Chinese chipmakers are betting on highly efficient silicon carbide (SiC) semiconductors to help solve the technology sector’s power problem. Shenzhen-based Basic Semiconductor is the latest contender looking to bankroll its expansion after it passed a listing hearing earlier this week in its path to an initial public offering (IPO) in Hong Kong. Founded in 2016 by graduates from Tsinghua...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著全球人工智慧（AI）熱潮對數據中心的能源網絡造成巨大壓力，中國一些晶片製造商開始押注於高效的碳化矽（SiC）半導體，以解決科技領域的電力問題。位於深圳的基本半導體公司（Basic Semiconductor）是最新的參與者，該公司在本週通過了上市聽證會，正朝著在香港進行首次公開募股（IPO）的方向邁進。
briefing.background: 隨著AI技術的快速發展，數據中心的能源需求急劇上升，這對現有的能源基礎設施造成了壓力。碳化矽（SiC）半導體因其高效率和耐高溫特性，成為解決這一問題的潛在方案。中國在半導體產業的發展受到政策支持，政府鼓勵本土企業加強技術創新，尤其是在AI和新能源領域。基本半導體成立於2016年，專注於SiC技術，隨著其IPO計劃的推進，顯示出市場對高效能半導體的需求正在增長。
briefing.analysis: 基本半導體的IPO計劃反映了中國晶片製造商在全球AI熱潮中尋求突破的努力。隨著數據中心對能源效率的要求日益提高，SiC半導體的市場潛力被廣泛看好。這些晶片不僅能降低能耗，還能提高運行效率，對於希望在競爭中脫穎而出的企業來說，這是一個重要的技術方向。然而，市場上也存在其他技術選擇，如氮化鎵（GaN）等，這可能會影響SiC的市場佔有率。基本半導體的成功與否將取決於其技術的成熟度及市場的接受度。

technology.title: China Defies US Restrictions and Builds the World’s Fastest Supercomputer
technology.summary: The Chinese supercomputer LineShine was ranked as the fastest in the world, despite not using any GPUs.

briefing.news_focus: The Chinese supercomputer LineShine was ranked as the fastest in the world, despite not using any GPUs.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的超級電腦LineShine被評為全球最快的超級電腦，這一成就令人矚目，因為它在建造過程中並未使用任何圖形處理單元（GPU）。這顯示出中國在高性能計算領域的技術突破，儘管面對美國的技術限制。
briefing.background: 近年來，中美之間的科技競爭日益加劇，特別是在超級電腦和人工智慧領域。美國對中國的高科技產品和技術實施了一系列限制措施，旨在阻止中國在這些關鍵技術上的進步。儘管如此，中國仍然在超級電腦的研發上取得了顯著進展，LineShine的成功標誌著中國在全球科技舞台上的重要地位，並顯示出其自主研發能力的提升。
briefing.analysis: LineShine的成功可能會進一步加劇中美科技競爭的緊張局勢。美國可能會對中國的技術進步感到擔憂，並考慮加強對中國的科技限制措施，以維護其在全球科技領域的領導地位。此外，這一成就也可能激勵其他國家加大對超級電腦技術的投資，進一步推動全球科技競爭的升級。值得注意的是，LineShine未使用GPU的設計選擇，可能顯示出中國在超級電腦架構上的創新思維，這一點在未來的技術發展中可能會成為一個重要的參考。

technology.title: ‘Tech firms are losing the public’: social media age bans near tipping point
technology.summary: UK is latest country to set minimum age for social media access but big tech is fighting back globally against curbs Social media bans go global: big tech faces a reckoning after Australia’s crackdown Arturo Béjar, a former employee turned whistleblower at Mark Zuckerberg’s Meta, has talked to parents around the world. He says they share the same perspective: they dread the day their children are old enough to go online. Governments appear to be listening too. This month the UK became the latest country to state that it would set a minimum age of 16 for accessing major social media platforms. Social media bans are becoming a legislative trend after the precedent set by Australia last year, when it imposed an age limit on platforms including Meta’s Instagram and Facebook, Google’s YouTube, Elon Musk’s X, TikTok and Snapchat. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: UK is latest country to set minimum age for social media access but big tech is fighting back globally against curbs Social media bans go global: big tech faces a reckoning after Australia’s crackdown Arturo Béjar, a former employee turned whistleblower at Mark Zuckerberg’s Meta, has talked to parents around the world. He says they share the same perspective: they dread the day their children are old enough to go online. Governments appear to be listening too. This month the UK became the latest country to state that it would set a minimum age of 16 for accessing major social media platforms. Social media bans are becoming a legislative trend after the precedent set by Australia last year, when it imposed an age limit on platforms including Meta’s Instagram and Facebook, Google’s YouTube, Elon Musk’s X, TikTok and Snapchat. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國最近宣布將社交媒體訪問的最低年齡設定為16歲，成為全球範圍內對社交媒體進行年齡限制的最新國家。這一趨勢受到澳大利亞去年立法的啟發，該國對包括Meta的Instagram和Facebook、Google的YouTube、Elon Musk的X、TikTok和Snapchat等平台實施了年齡限制。隨著社交媒體公司面臨越來越多的監管壓力，這些企業正在全球範圍內抵制這些限制。
briefing.background: 隨著社交媒體的普及，越來越多的家長對孩子的網絡使用表示擔憂，這促使各國政府開始考慮立法限制未成年人使用社交媒體的年齡。澳大利亞在去年率先實施了社交媒體年齡限制，這一舉措引發了全球的關注和模仿。英國的最新政策顯示出政府對於保護青少年免受網絡危害的重視，並可能成為其他國家的參考範本。隨著立法趨勢的增長，科技公司面臨的監管挑戰也日益加劇。
briefing.analysis: 社交媒體年齡限制的推行反映了政府對於青少年網絡安全的重視，但也引發了科技公司的強烈反對。這些公司擔心年齡限制會影響其用戶基礎及廣告收入，並可能導致用戶流失。參考報導提到的YouTube與青少年提起的社交媒體成癮訴訟，進一步突顯了社交媒體對青少年心理健康的影響，這可能成為未來立法的重要依據。各國政府在制定相關政策時，需平衡保護青少年與維護科技創新之間的矛盾，未來的發展仍需持續觀察。

supporting_titles: Google's YouTube settles social media addiction case with teen
supporting_summaries: The 15-year-old plaintiff's case against three other tech giants begins next month.

politics.title: Anti-ICE organizers shift focus to defend democracy from Trump assault
politics.summary: Citizens in Minnesota using lessons learned from migrant crackdown to protect elections from president’s threats When thousands of immigration agents flooded Minnesota earlier this year, a loose network of neighbors sprang into action. They fed each other. They got kids to and from school safely. They tracked the surge that tore through their communities. After organizing, block by block, to monitor Donald Trump’s extraordinary crackdown on their state, the same neighbors are shifting their focus to a different threat. What if the US president tries to steal an election? Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Citizens in Minnesota using lessons learned from migrant crackdown to protect elections from president’s threats When thousands of immigration agents flooded Minnesota earlier this year, a loose network of neighbors sprang into action. They fed each other. They got kids to and from school safely. They tracked the surge that tore through their communities. After organizing, block by block, to monitor Donald Trump’s extraordinary crackdown on their state, the same neighbors are shifting their focus to a different threat. What if the US president tries to steal an election? Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 在明尼蘇達州，隨著成千上萬的移民執法官員進入該州，一個鬆散的社區網絡迅速行動起來，彼此支持，確保孩子安全上學，並追蹤社區中的變化。這些鄰居們在面對特朗普總統的移民打壓行動後，現在將焦點轉向另一個威脅：防止特朗普可能試圖竊取選舉的行為。
briefing.background: 特朗普政府的移民政策引發了全國範圍內的抗議與反彈，特別是在移民社區中。明尼蘇達州的社區因應移民執法行動而組織起來，展現了地方社區在面對政府政策時的韌性與團結。隨著2024年美國總統選舉的臨近，對於選舉安全的擔憂也日益增加，尤其是特朗普在過去的選舉中提出的質疑與指控，讓許多人擔心民主制度的完整性。
briefing.analysis: 這一事件反映了社區在面對政府壓力時的自發組織能力，並顯示出對民主制度的關注。隨著特朗普的選舉活動逐漸升溫，社區成員們的擔憂不僅限於移民問題，還擴展到選舉的公平性。這些鄰居們的行動可能會激發更多社區參與，形成對抗潛在選舉操控的力量。然而，特朗普及其支持者可能會對這些行動持反對態度，認為這是對其合法選舉活動的干擾，未來的政治對抗可能會更加激烈。

politics.title: Venezuelan earthquakes test Trump’s new western hemisphere policy after gutting of USAID
politics.summary: Marco Rubio is scrambling to provide effective disaster response to country whose president US deposed in January This week’s dual earthquakes in Venezuela are a test for the new era of American power in the western hemisphere, as the Trump administration scrambles to provide an effective disaster response mission to a country that it now calls an ally in Latin America, after a US special forces raid in January deposed the country’s strongman leader, Nicolás Maduro. The US is marshalling what secretary of state Marco Rubio called a “big, fast, effective” and “whole-of-government” response as the state department sent three specialised urban search and rescue teams and pledged a $150m assistance fund that one former disaster relief expert called the largest he had seen within 24 hours of an incident. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Marco Rubio is scrambling to provide effective disaster response to country whose president US deposed in January This week’s dual earthquakes in Venezuela are a test for the new era of American power in the western hemisphere, as the Trump administration scrambles to provide an effective disaster response mission to a country that it now calls an ally in Latin America, after a US special forces raid in January deposed the country’s strongman leader, Nicolás Maduro. The US is marshalling what secretary of state Marco Rubio called a “big, fast, effective” and “whole-of-government” response as the state department sent three specialised urban search and rescue teams and pledged a $150m assistance fund that one former disaster relief expert called the largest he had seen within 24 hours of an incident. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 本則新聞報導了委內瑞拉近期發生的雙重地震，對美國特朗普政府在西半球的新政策提出了挑戰。美國國務卿馬可·魯比奧表示，政府正在迅速組織一項全面的災難應對行動，派遣三支專業的城市搜索與救援隊伍，並承諾提供1.5億美元的援助基金，這被認為是災難事件後24小時內最大的援助承諾之一。這一行動旨在支持美國在拉丁美洲的盟友，尤其是在1月推翻了尼古拉斯·馬杜羅的強人統治之後。
briefing.background: 委內瑞拉的政治局勢在過去幾年中持續動盪，特別是馬杜羅政府的統治引發了國際社會的廣泛關注與反對。美國在1月發動特種部隊行動，推翻馬杜羅，並試圖重建與委內瑞拉的關係。特朗普政府的西半球政策旨在加強與拉丁美洲國家的聯繫，特別是在經濟與安全方面。然而，隨著地震的發生，這一政策面臨實際考驗，因為美國需要迅速有效地響應人道主義危機，以展現其在該地區的影響力與責任。
briefing.analysis: 此次地震對特朗普政府的西半球政策構成了重大考驗，特別是在美國與委內瑞拉關係重建的背景下。馬可·魯比奧強調的“全政府”應對策略顯示出美國希望在災難管理中展現其能力，進一步鞏固與新盟友的關係。然而，這也可能引發對美國干預政策的質疑，特別是在過去的軍事行動後，當地民眾對美國的信任度仍然不高。此外，這一援助行動的規模和速度可能成為其他國家在類似情況下的參考標準，進一步影響國際人道主義援助的動態。

politics.title: Donald Trump threatens to annihilate Iran after crossfire over Hormuz – Middle East crisis live
politics.summary: Iran attacked Bahrain and Kuwait after US strikes, and threatened a ‘complete halt’ to talks US and Iran trade strikes as both sides accuse the other of endangering ceasefire Iran’s foreign minister Abbas Araghchi is in Baghdad for a meeting with his Iraqi counterpart. The pair have been discussing the latest attacks as well as the all-important issue of Hormuz, according to Reuters. Gulf states have publicly said that the strait of Hormuz must remain toll-free. For his part, Araghchi’s Iraqi counterpart said that he stressed the importance of opening the passage in their joint meetings and that Iran should lift the naval blockade. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Iran attacked Bahrain and Kuwait after US strikes, and threatened a ‘complete halt’ to talks US and Iran trade strikes as both sides accuse the other of endangering ceasefire Iran’s foreign minister Abbas Araghchi is in Baghdad for a meeting with his Iraqi counterpart. The pair have been discussing the latest attacks as well as the all-important issue of Hormuz, according to Reuters. Gulf states have publicly said that the strait of Hormuz must remain toll-free. For his part, Araghchi’s Iraqi counterpart said that he stressed the importance of opening the passage in their joint meetings and that Iran should lift the naval blockade. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗在美國對其目標進行空襲後，對巴林和科威特發動報復攻擊，並威脅要完全停止與美國的談判。雙方互相指責對方危害停火協議。伊朗外長阿巴斯·阿拉赫奇正在巴格達與伊拉克外長會晤，討論最新的攻擊事件及霍爾木茲海峽的重要性。海灣國家公開表示，霍爾木茲海峽必須保持免費通行，而阿拉赫奇的伊拉克對口則強調了在會議中開放通道的重要性，並要求伊朗解除海上封鎖。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球最重要的石油運輸通道之一，任何在此地區的軍事衝突都可能影響全球能源市場。美國與伊朗之間的緊張關係由於核協議的破裂而加劇，雙方近期的軍事行動使得局勢更加複雜。海灣國家對於保持霍爾木茲海峽的通行自由極為重視，因為這直接關係到其經濟安全。此外，伊朗的軍事行動也可能引發其他地區大國的介入，進一步影響中東的地緣政治格局。
briefing.analysis: 此次事件顯示出美國與伊朗之間的軍事對抗正在升級，雙方都在尋求通過武力來達成各自的政治目的。美國的空襲被視為對伊朗擴張行為的直接回應，而伊朗的報復行動則是其維護國家主權的表現。根據BBC的報導，伊朗對美國在科威特和巴林的基礎設施發動攻擊，這一細節強調了衝突的地域擴展性。另一方面，根據《外交家》的報導，中國在此背景下的角色也值得關注，因為其正試圖穩定海灣國家的關係，以防止其與美國的接近。未來，若雙方無法達成有效的外交解決方案，局勢可能會進一步惡化，並引發更大範圍的地區衝突。

supporting_titles: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
After the Iran War, China’s Middle East Strategy Will Prioritize the Gulf
supporting_summaries: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.
China’s top priority is now keeping the Gulf states, and above all Saudi Arabia and the UAE, from drawing closer to Washington.

economy.title: Will Japan’s tourist visa fees, interest rate policy impact its booming property market?
economy.summary: With Japan imposing higher visa fees for tourists from July while moving away from an ultra-loose monetary policy, foreign investors must prepare themselves for both direct and indirect impacts on their real estate assets, according to agents and analysts. There is a dearth of data on the total number of homes bought by non-residents in Japan, but agents said the two main reasons for purchasing were to either use them as a primary base while they explored the country’s tourist destinations, or...

briefing.news_focus: With Japan imposing higher visa fees for tourists from July while moving away from an ultra-loose monetary policy, foreign investors must prepare themselves for both direct and indirect impacts on their real estate assets, according to agents and analysts. There is a dearth of data on the total number of homes bought by non-residents in Japan, but agents said the two main reasons for purchasing were to either use them as a primary base while they explored the country’s tourist destinations, or...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 日本自七月起提高了旅遊簽證費用，並逐步退出超寬鬆的貨幣政策，這將對外國投資者在日本的房地產資產產生直接和間接的影響。雖然目前缺乏非居民在日本購房的總數據，但房地產經紀人指出，外國人購房的主要原因是作為探索日本旅遊目的地的主要基地。
briefing.background: 日本的房地產市場在近年來吸引了大量外國投資者，特別是在疫情後，隨著國際旅遊的恢復，需求持續增長。提高旅遊簽證費用可能會減少某些國家的遊客流入，進而影響他們在日本的消費行為，包括房地產投資。此外，日本央行的貨幣政策轉變，意味著利率上升，可能會使借貸成本增加，對投資者的購房決策造成影響。這些變化使得市場前景變得更加複雜。
briefing.analysis: 日本政府的簽證政策和貨幣政策變化，將使外國投資者在日本的房地產市場面臨新的挑戰。提高簽證費用可能會抑制部分潛在買家的興趣，特別是來自高費用國家的遊客。另一方面，利率上升將增加購房的財務負擔，尤其是對依賴貸款的投資者而言。根據參考報導，雖然中國的房地產市場面臨惡化的情況，但日本的情況則可能因政策變化而出現不同的市場反應。這意味著投資者需要重新評估他們的策略，以應對不斷變化的市場環境。

supporting_summaries: Government remedies are not up to the job

economy.title: The AI bubble has further to run despite the looming crash
economy.summary: As tech firms make huge profits and investors fear losing out, both are doing their best to hold off the day of reckoning OpenAI staggers AI model release after White House request Every couple of decades, investors will ask themselves how long can the stock market keep climbing. Is it safe to buy more shares? Is their pension or equity portfolio vulnerable should financial markets, and especially those in the US, come crashing down to earth? When stock markets rise to historically high levels – and beyond the level when normal profits can sustain share prices – a few “experts” typically warn of an impending crash. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: As tech firms make huge profits and investors fear losing out, both are doing their best to hold off the day of reckoning OpenAI staggers AI model release after White House request Every couple of decades, investors will ask themselves how long can the stock market keep climbing. Is it safe to buy more shares? Is their pension or equity portfolio vulnerable should financial markets, and especially those in the US, come crashing down to earth? When stock markets rise to historically high levels – and beyond the level when normal profits can sustain share prices – a few “experts” typically warn of an impending crash. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 隨著科技公司獲利豐厚，投資者擔心錯失良機，雙方努力延遲市場崩潰的到來。儘管專家警告股市可能面臨崩潰，許多投資者仍在考慮是否應該購買更多股票，特別是在美國市場。報導指出，當股市達到歷史高點，超出正常獲利水平時，通常會出現對即將崩潰的警告。
briefing.background: 當前的經濟環境中，科技公司，尤其是人工智慧（AI）相關企業，正面臨前所未有的成長與獲利機會。隨著AI技術的快速發展，投資者對於這一領域的興趣與投入也在不斷增加。然而，這種增長的可持續性受到質疑，許多專家擔心市場過熱可能導致崩潰。此外，白宮對於AI模型的釋出提出要求，顯示出政府對於科技發展的監管意圖，這也可能影響市場的信心與動態。
briefing.analysis: 在當前的市場環境中，科技公司與投資者之間的利益關係愈發緊密。科技公司希望透過持續的獲利來吸引更多投資，而投資者則希望在股市高漲時獲得最大回報。然而，市場的高風險也讓許多投資者感到不安，特別是在專家警告潛在崩潰的情況下。參考報導中提到的白宮信函，暗示美國政府對於市場的干預與監管將可能影響投資者的信心，進一步加劇市場的不確定性。另一方面，香港的金融地位也可能受到影響，因為全球資本流動的變化可能會改變投資者的選擇與策略。

economy.title: China’s big trucks go electric and abroad as subsidies help pave road to net-zero freight
economy.summary: Domestic makers of heavy-duty trucks are emerging as the latest beneficiaries of accelerating electrification on China’s roads, as technological gains and lower ownership costs are bolstering overseas sales amid a global energy crisis. Southeast Asia and Africa, where Chinese makers have already established overseas assembly hubs, were expected to serve as new growth engines for companies ranging from FAW Jiefang to Foton Commercial Vehicles, according to analysts at S&P Global Ratings. The two...

briefing.news_focus: Domestic makers of heavy-duty trucks are emerging as the latest beneficiaries of accelerating electrification on China’s roads, as technological gains and lower ownership costs are bolstering overseas sales amid a global energy crisis. Southeast Asia and Africa, where Chinese makers have already established overseas assembly hubs, were expected to serve as new growth engines for companies ranging from FAW Jiefang to Foton Commercial Vehicles, according to analysts at S&P Global Ratings. The two...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 中國的重型卡車製造商正逐步受益於電動化的加速發展，這使得他們的國外銷售增長。隨著技術進步和擁有成本降低，這些企業在全球能源危機中獲得了新的機會。分析師預測，東南亞和非洲將成為中國卡車製造商如FAW解放和福田商用車的新增長引擎，因為這些地區已經建立了海外組裝中心。
briefing.background: 中國在推動電動化的過程中，重型卡車的電動化成為一個重要的發展方向。隨著環保政策的推進和國際市場對清潔能源的需求增加，中國的重型卡車製造商正積極轉型，尋求在全球市場中佔有一席之地。這些企業的成功不僅依賴於國內的補貼政策，還得益於其在海外市場的擴張，特別是在東南亞和非洲等新興市場，這些地區的基礎設施建設需求旺盛，為中國製造商提供了良好的商機。
briefing.analysis: 中國重型卡車製造商的電動化轉型顯示出其在全球市場中的競爭力提升。根據S&P Global Ratings的分析，這些企業的增長潛力在於其能夠利用技術進步和成本優勢來吸引國際客戶。然而，參考報導指出，中國的這些新興產業可能仍不足以彌補傳統產業的衰退，這反映出中國經濟結構轉型面臨的挑戰。不同於主新聞的樂觀預測，參考報導強調了新興產業的規模仍然有限，可能無法完全抵消舊有產業的影響，這顯示出市場對於中國經濟未來的不同看法。
